title: CottageCraft Axolotls
description: Adds up to 34 extra custom Axolotl Variants, including Biome & Mob specific ones
body:
# CottageCraft Axolotls An Add-on Mod created for [CottageCraft Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cottagecraft) # Below is written for previous version and may not be accurate for v3.0.0 Currently this mod adds 34 Variants, with more coming in the future. All Axolotls are currently naturally spawning in Lush Caves, just like normal variants. You can join the [CottageCraft Discord](https://discord.gg/gR8v49Thx8) Server for any issues/questions ### Biome Themes - Mossolotl (Lush Cave theme) - Sandy (Desert theme) - Frostolotl (Snow/Ice theme) - Jungle (Jungle theme) - Grove (Cherry Grove theme) - Swamp (Mangrove Swamp theme) - Nether (Nether theme) - Crimson (Crimson Forest theme) - Warped (Warped Forest theme) - Void (Void theme) ### Mob Themes - Beeolotl (Bee theme) - Foxolotl (Fox theme) - Guardian (Guardian theme) - Pigolotl (Pig theme) ### Misc Theme - Honey (Honey theme) - Amethyst (Amethyst theme) - Lotohhayl (Hay theme) - Ghostolotl (Ghost theme) - Spudolotl (Potato theme) - Lionlotl (Lion theme) ### Specials - Wizalotl (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Wizard Outift theme) - Musholotl (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Mushroom theme) - Hellfire (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Blue/Black Fire theme) - Bloob (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Candy Meatball theme) - Les (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Sunset theme) - Livolotl (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Red/Orange theme) - Lumberlotl (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Lumberjack theme) - Creme (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Pink/Purple/Creamy theme) - Stellaolotl (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Blue/Purple theme) - Berrilotl (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Chocolate Strawberry theme) - Mlemolotl (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Toothless the Dragon theme) - Froggilotl (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Frog/Mushroom theme) - Mellolotl (CottageCraft SMP Player theme - Yellow/Banana theme) ## Requirements Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) & [More Axolotl Variants API](https://modrinth.com/mod/mavapi), compatibility with both [More Axolotl](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-axolotl) & [More Axolotl Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/mavm)

*Feel free to use this mod in other modpacks but keep the download within the Modrinth Ecosystem and do not reupload* --- All Axolotl textures are done by me
Summon Commands ``` /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:moss"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:wizard"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:amethyst"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:mushroom"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:hellfire"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:bee"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:grove"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:desert"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:bloop"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:fox"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:ghost"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:les"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:guardian"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:hay"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:honey"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:snow"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:jungle"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:liv"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:lumberjack"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:creme"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:nether"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:crimson"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:pig"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:potato"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:stella"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:stone"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:swamp"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:void"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:warped"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:berri"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:lion"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:mellow"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:mlem"} /summon axolotl ~ ~ ~ {Variant:"cottage-craft-axolotl:froggy"} ```
## Planned Content - ~~Transparency for Honey & Ghost Axolotl~~ Complete - More Axolotls to be added still - Some Configuration Features (Still deciding how much should be configurable) - Biome specific spawning - ~~Lava Immunity/swimming for nether themed axolotls~~ - Rare Breeds
